name: SIRT2 overexpression
summary: SIRT2 overexpression is normalized for BubR1-linked mouse genome-surveillance and lifespan evidence.
mechanism_summary: Increases SIRT2 activity to affect BubR1 biology and test chromosome-stability-linked aging phenotypes in mice.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: SIRT2 and NMN BubR1 hypomorphic mouse study; SIRT2 and NMN increased BubR1 biology and extended BubR1 hypomorphic mouse lifespan.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
